text: Use forge_tool to create celsius_to_f. Description: Converts Celsius to Fahrenheit. Implementation: return { fahrenheit: Number(input.celsius) * 9/5 + 32 }; Input schema: { type: "object", properties: { celsius: { type: "number" } }, required: ["celsius"] }
